name: Trakstar Performance Management API
what_it_does: Trakstar performance management and employee evaluation REST API for performance review cycles, goal management, and talent analytics. Enables AI agents to manage performance review cycle creation and assignment for automated review process management, handle goal setting and OKR tracking for employee performance alignment, access 360-degree feedback collection and management for comprehensive performance evaluation, retrieve performance review completion tracking and reminder automation for HR workflow operations, manage rating calibration and performance distribution for talent management analytics, handle succession planning and high-potential identification for workforce continuity, access employee development plan and coaching workflow for talent development automation, retrieve performance analytics and talent insights for HR business intelligence, manage continuous feedback and check-in workflow for ongoing performance management, and integrate Trakstar with HRIS (BambooHR, ADP, Workday) and payroll systems.
use_cases: Running review cycles from HR operations agents
Tracking goals from performance management agents
Analyzing performance from talent analytics agents
best_when: An HR team or manager wanting AI agents to automate performance review cycle management, goal tracking, 360-degree feedback collection, and talent analytics for mid-market organizations.
avoid_when: EMPLOYMENT DISCRIMINATION RISK IN AUTOMATED PERFORMANCE DECISIONS: Automated performance rating aggregation and ranking used in compensation or termination decisions must be audited for disparate impact by protected class; automated performance-based decisions without bias audit create EEOC charge and employment discrimination liability. GDPR DATA SUBJECT RIGHTS FOR EU EMPLOYEES: Automated performance review data for EU employees constitutes employment data under GDPR; automated retention beyond legally required period and failure to honor data subject rights creates GDPR violation. NLRA CONCERTED ACTIVITY PROTECTION: Automated monitoring of peer feedback content for negative manager reviews must not be used to discipline employees for protected concerted activity; automated content monitoring of employee feedback creates NLRA violation risk. Performance data in compensation decisions — automated compensation recommendations derived from Trakstar performance scores must be validated for pay equity; automated compensation that creates gender or race pay disparities creates ECOA and state equal pay act exposure.

auth.notes: Trakstar uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Austin, Texas HQ. Founded 2001. Private (Mitratech acquired 2020, part of Trakstar talent suite). Performance management and hiring software. 2,500+ mid-market customers. Trakstar suite includes Hire (ATS), Learn (LMS), and Perform (performance management). Competes with Lattice, Culture Amp, and 15Five for performance management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-user annual subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription; standalone Perform and bundled Trakstar suite pricing
pricing.notes: Austin TX. Mitratech subsidiary (acquired 2020). Founded 2001. 2,500+ mid-market customers. Perform + Hire + Learn suite. Per-user annual subscription.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key/OAuth token; documented per tier

known_agent_gotchas: NO WEBHOOKS — REVIEW COMPLETION REQUIRES POLLING: Trakstar lacks webhook support; performance review completion, goal achievement, and feedback events require polling; implement scheduled polling aligned with review cycle calendar

AUTOMATED PERFORMANCE-BASED DECISIONS REQUIRE BIAS AUDIT: Automated performance rating aggregation used in compensation, promotion, or termination recommendations must be validated for disparate impact; automated decisions without bias audit create EEOC disparate impact liability

Review cycle timing and forced completion — automated performance review reminders and deadline enforcement must align with employment policies; automated forced completion of reviews before deadline may pressure managers into cursory reviews that create performance documentation legal issues

GDPR EU employee review data retention — automated retention of EU employee performance reviews must comply with jurisdiction-specific employment data retention limits; automated indefinite retention of EU performance data creates GDPR violation

360-degree feedback anonymity — automated 360-degree feedback collection must preserve respondent anonymity per configured policy; automated reporting that inadvertently reveals individual feedback sources creates workplace retaliation risk and violates feedback program trust

Mitratech acquisition integration — Trakstar was acquired by Mitratech in 2020; verify current API investment and product roadmap within Mitratech talent suite; product consolidation may affect API stability
agent_readiness.security_notes: Performance management. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2/API key. US. Employee performance and review data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Performance management. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2/API key. US. Employee performance and review data.
